filters.expression: (url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "UNION" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "SELECT" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "DROP" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "OR 1=1" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "xp_cmdshell" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "SLEEP(" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "WAITFOR")

(url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "<script" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "javascript:" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "onerror=" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "onload=" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "alert(" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "document.cookie")

(http.request.uri.path contains "../" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "../" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "/etc/passwd" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "/etc/shadow" or url_decode(http.request.uri.query) contains "/proc/self")
